sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n86866" key="pro/braxus" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πρόβρᾰχῠς</orth> (sc. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">πούς</foreign>), <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n86866.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">the foot ̆ - - - -,</tr_> Diom.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0543.tlg001.perseus-grc1:p.481" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.481</biblScope> </bibl> K.</sense> </entryFree>
